# Current Compiler Engine Vendor Snapshot

This directory contains the vendor snapshot required by the runtime package. Keep code and machine-readable assets intact; maintain detailed compiler documentation in the compiler repository.

The v35.1 runtime package keeps vendor material minimal to avoid stale release documentation while preserving all files needed by local tests and runtime integration.
